task_completion.description: Verify the correct dataset is loaded into Oracle Analytics Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data Panel on the left side of the screen shows the dataset name 'sample_order_lines2023'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Customer Tier' custom calculation has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A data element named 'Customer Tier' is visible in the Data Panel (usually under 'My Calculations') or actively placed in the Grammar panel.

task_completion.description: Verify a Bar Chart visualization has been added to the canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A bar chart is visible on the main canvas area, and the visualization type icon in the top-left of the Grammar panel indicates a Bar Chart.

task_completion.description: Verify the bar chart maps 'Customer Tier' to the count of customers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Grammar panel shows 'Customer Tier' assigned to the Category (X-axis) or Color, and a count metric (e.g., 'Count of Customer Name' or similar count aggregation) assigned to the Values (Y-axis). The chart itself displays bars for Gold, Silver, and Bronze.

task_completion.description: Verify the bar chart is sorted logically by tier value, not alphabetically.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bars on the chart are ordered sequentially by tier value (e.g., Bronze, Silver, Gold OR Gold, Silver, Bronze). It must NOT be sorted alphabetically (which would be Bronze, Gold, Silver).

task_completion.description: Verify the workbook is named correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top header/title bar of the Oracle Analytics Desktop window or the active tab displays the name 'Customer_Segmentation_Analysis'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop graphical interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Oracle Analytics Desktop application window is visible and actively being used, rather than a command prompt or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the visualization is genuinely rendered within the BI tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart appears integrated into the Oracle Analytics canvas with corresponding active settings in the Grammar and Data panels, not as an opened image file or external document.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a script to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no text editors (like Notepad or VS Code) or Python/PowerShell scripts visible on screen generating the output files directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected dataset is 'sample_order_lines2023.xlsx'. The workbook must be saved as 'Customer_Segmentation_Analysis'. The custom calculation must be named 'Customer Tier' with categories 'Gold', 'Silver', and 'Bronze'. The visualization must be a Bar Chart showing the count of customers (e.g., Count of Customer Name) grouped by 'Customer Tier'. Crucially, the bar chart must be sorted by the logical value of the tiers (e.g., Bronze, Silver, Gold) and NOT alphabetically (which would incorrectly place Gold between Bronze and Silver).
